title: DoughTastic Diner Delights Play Set, 5 Colour Dough Tubs, 16 Moulds, 4 Accessories, 3 Tools, Ages 3+
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes 5 colourful dough tubs, 16 creative moulds, 4 diner-themed accessories, and 3 special tools for endless creative play possibilities
CREATIVE PLAY: Make it, shape it, and mix it to create delightful diner treats including ice creams, burgers, waffles, and cupcakes
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Develops fine motor skills, imagination, and creative thinking through hands-on play whilst learning about food preparation
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 years and above, with easy-to-handle pieces and safe materials
VERSATILE TOOLS: Features specialised tools including a waffle press and various moulds to create realistic-looking play food items
description: Transform playtime into a delightful culinary adventure with the DoughTastic Diner Delights Play Set! This comprehensive creative kit includes everything young chefs need to whip up imaginative diner treats. The set comes with 5 vibrant colours of dough, perfect for crafting everything from colourful ice creams to tasty-looking burgers. With 16 detailed moulds and 4 accessories, children can create an array of pretend diner favourites including waffles, cupcakes, and ice cream sundaes. The 3 specially designed tools, including a waffle press, make shaping and moulding even more fun and engaging. Designed for children aged 3 and above, this set encourages creative play, fine motor skills development, and imaginative storytelling. The dough is easy to shape and mix, allowing endless combinations of pretend treats. Whether creating a full diner menu or just making favourite desserts, this set provides hours of creative entertainment. The colourful packaging and comprehensive toolkit make it an ideal gift for aspiring young chefs who love imaginative play.
